title: ad (Sanity document type)
description: Advertising slots managed in Sanity Studio. Editors create/pause/schedule ads without a deploy.

slot.description: leaderboard = 970×120 between sections; mpu = 300×250 in article sidebar

brand.description: Display name / headline for the ad

markets.description: Markets where this ad should appear

languages.description: Languages where this ad should appear

sections.description: Limit to specific sections; empty = all sections

priority.description: Higher = shown first when multiple ads match
